    A

    addMagicUtilsMessages(boolean) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap.BungeeBootstrap.Builder
    Sets whether to add default MagicUtils messages.

    Sets the async executor for commands.

    B

    bindClientLocaleSync(boolean) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap.BungeeBootstrap.Builder
    Toggles synchronizing player language from client locale updates.
    bindLoggerLanguage(boolean) - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap.BungeeBootstrap.Builder
    Sets whether to bind the logger to the language manager.
    build() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap.BungeeBootstrap.Builder
    Builds the bootstrap result.
    buildRuntime() - Method in class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap.BungeeBootstrap.Builder
    Builds the bootstrap result and starts the runtime.
    BungeeBootstrap - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap
    BungeeCord-specific bootstrap helper for wiring MagicUtils services.
    BungeeBootstrap.Builder - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap
    Builder for wiring MagicUtils services on BungeeCord.
    BungeeBootstrap.Result - Record Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap
    Result of Bungee bootstrap.
    BungeeBootstrap.RuntimeResult - Record Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap
    Result of Bungee bootstrap including the runtime instance.
    BungeeComponentSerializer - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bungee
    Converts Adventure components to Bungee chat components.
    BungeePlatformLogger - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bungee
    JUL-backed platform logger for BungeeCord.
    BungeePlatformLogger(Logger) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bungee.BungeePlatformLogger
    Creates a logger wrapper.
    BungeePlatformProvider - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bungee
    Platform provider for BungeeCord runtime.
    BungeePlatformProvider(ProxyServer) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bungee.BungeePlatformProvider
    Creates a Bungee platform provider with default logger and config directory.
    BungeePlatformProvider(ProxyServer, Path) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bungee.BungeePlatformProvider
    Creates a Bungee platform provider with default logger.
    BungeePlatformProvider(ProxyServer, Logger, Path) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bungee.BungeePlatformProvider
    Creates a Bungee platform provider with explicit logger and data directory.
    BungeePlatformProvider(ProxyServer, Logger, Path, Plugin) - Constructor for class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bungee.BungeePlatformProvider
    Creates a Bungee platform provider with explicit logger and data directory.
